raw_consumer_statement:
I opened a dispute XX/XX/year> for XXXX as the merchant had sent me the wrong size and damaged shoes, which I have pictures of. I had tried to get a return and my money back from the merchant but they were mostly unresponsive and had offered a partial credit back as a gift card to purchase more shoes. I didnt want more shoes or to keep the damaged and wrong size shoes. At no time did Citi reach out to get these pictures or email correspondence. On XX/XX/year> I was determined responsible because the merchant lied and said the wrong shoes were sent back. Nothing had been sent back because they refused return and I have not been in contact with them since XX/XX/XXXX. 

I called XX/XX/year> to ask why this was the decision and I appealed. I was told to send evidence through their email. I provided pdfs of the photos, and emails on XX/XX/XXXX, a confirmation email was sent. On XX/XX/year> I was informed that since I didnt send evidence I would need to talk with the merchant or send evidence but no information was provided to resend evidence. I called XX/XX/year> to ask why my pdfs did not count and was told there was a misunderstanding that Citi thought the merchant offered to credit my card. I was told they would open an appeal. 

On XX/XX/year> a rude letter was sent saying that because I didnt send information the case was closed. I called once more to understand why no one was looking at the evidence provided. On XX/XX/year> another letter came stating the case was closed and to work with the merchant. I called XX/XX/year> to ask once more about the case and was told they would ask to have the case reopened. I didnt hear anything and called again XX/XX/year> and was told I needed to wait to see if they would reopen and there was nothing I could.
